{{Quote|I will have revenge for my brother… And I will spit on your corpse when I am done!|Tabor to Silus|<ref name="Marked">{{Tales|24|Marked}}</ref>}}
[[File:TaborDeath.jpg|thumb|left|Tabor is killed by Silus.]]
'''Tabor''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Aleena/Legends|Aleena]] who participated in a fighting sport involved in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] on an unnamed planet in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. When [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] sent [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] to kill the champion of the sport, [[Silus (Drovian)|Silus]], Tabor engaged Silus in combat. However, the Aleena was quickly killed by the [[Drovian]]. Silus was killed by Maul shortly after.
